target:
July 22nd, 1:02 PM.
It's been 1 hour and 37 minutes since arriving at Hitogashima Island…

I ate this thing called "nare sushi" before getting on the boat.
It was amazing.

If you come to Wakayama, you should try it…
I want to hear your thoughts.
By the way, you asked me why I became inverted before, right?
If I answer now, blood flows to the brain and my thoughts clear.

You should try it too.
That stubborn head of yours
might get a little better.

I'll keep an eye on things for a while.
That's all.
